understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time; a level is only cleared when all goals are occupied simultaneously, and the full game is won after clearing the final level within the step budgets.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn spent one step and could be a directional move or a CLICK on a grid coordinate. CLICKs were used to select/teleport the currently controlled selectable piece to the clicked position when the destination was valid; attempts to CLICK onto blocked/invalid tiles resulted in no movement. Obstacles/walls prevented moving or placing onto certain tiles, and with multiple selectable pieces you needed to switch between them (by clicking their positions) and position them so every '+' was covered before steps ran out.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with '+' at the same time; a level is only cleared when all goals are occupied simultaneously, and the full game is won after clearing the final level within the step budgets.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn spent one step and could be a directional move or a CLICK on a grid coordinate. CLICKs were used to select/teleport the currently controlled selectable piece to the clicked position when the destination was valid; attempts to CLICK onto blocked/invalid tiles resulted in no movement. Obstacles/walls prevented moving or placing onto certain tiles, and with multiple selectable pieces you needed to switch between them (by clicking their positions) and position them so every '+' was covered before steps ran out.
